subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the Most Great Remembrance, when there descended unto him, from the presence of the Ancient King, that which brought solace to his eyes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بالذکر الاعظم اذ نزل له من لدن مالک القدم ما قرت به عین
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @eulogies; reminiscences, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
